sections.paragraph:
Original: יענה

Transliteration: ya‛ănâh

Phonetic: yah-an-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. an unclean bird
    1. owl, ostrich, literally translated as " daughters of the owl"
    2. perhaps an extinct bird, exact meaning unknown

Origin: from H3283

TWOT entry: 884b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
